Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.geometry.estimators.DualConicRobustEstimatorListener

  • Packages that use DualConicRobustEstimatorListener 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate basic geometric structures

    • Uses of DualConicRobustEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators

      Fields in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators declared as DualConicRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected DualConicRobustEstimatorListener DualConicRobustEstimator.mListener
      Listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators that return DualConicRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      DualConicRobustEstimatorListener DualConicRobustEstimator.getListener()
      Returns reference to listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators with parameters of type DualConicRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and default robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and default estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, List<Line2D> lines)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and lines and default robust estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, List<Line2D> lines, double[] qualityScores)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and lines and default estimator method.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, List<Line2D> lines, double[] qualityScores, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provied listener and lines.
      static DualConicRobustEstimator DualConicRobustEstimator.create​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener, List<Line2D> lines, com.irurueta.numerical.robust.RobustEstimatorMethod method)
      Creates a dual conic robust estimator based on 2D line samples and using provided listener and lines.
      void DualConicRobustEstimator.setListener​(DualConicRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Sets listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
